name: Discover influencers in Shopify customers with influencers.club, GPT-4o and SendGrid
description:
How it works:

Get multi social platform data for e-commerce clients with their email and send personalized comms to onboard them as organic creators, affiliates or ambassadors.

Step by step workflow to enrich Shopify customers' emails with multi social (Instagram, Tiktok, Youtube, Twitter, Onlyfans, Twitch and more) profiles, analytics and metrics using the influencers.club API and send tailored outreach to activate them as creators.

Set up:

Shopify (can be swapped for any e-commerce CRM like Wix, WooCommerce or Hubspot, Sheets, direct DB integration)
Influencers.club API
Sendgrid (can be swapped for any programmatic email sender like Mailgun)
Slack (optional notification for large influencers)
